sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n36275" key="e)ntoni/a" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἐντον-ία</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <abbr TEIform="abbr">=</abbr> Lat. <sense id="n36275.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">distentio penis,</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg2052.tlg001:1:46" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Horap.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1.46</biblScope> </bibl> (<xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">v.l.</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">εὐτ-</ref> </xr>).</sense> </entryFree>
